problem_solved: Physicians spend significant time on clinical documentation, leading to burnout and reduced patient care time
solution_description: AI-powered medical scribe that uses ambient listening technology to automatically generate clinical notes from patient encounters. Designed to work in the background without requiring physician prompts. Mobile-first approach with EHR integration
notes: US-based AI scribe. Acquisition signals market consolidation in AI scribing space. Technology approach similar to Abridge/DeepScribe
